I0020B_PRMRY_MDCL_ICD_CD I0020B Primary Medical Condition ICD Code CHAR 8 ICD Code effective 10/01/2019
769 J2100_RCNT_SRGRY_SNF_CARE_IND J2100_RCNT_SRGRY_SNF_CARE_IND J2100 Recent Surgery Requiring Active SNF Care CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident had a major surgical procedure during the prior inpatient hospital stay that requires active care during the SNF stay. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
8 = Unknown effective 10/01/2019
770 J2300_KNEE_RPLCMT_IND J2300_KNEE_RPLCMT_IND J2300 Knee Replacement -
